data.title: Korvest Ltd Announces New Securities Issuance Under Employee Incentive Scheme
data.description:
Korvest Ltd. ( (AU:KOV) ) just unveiled an update.

Korvest Ltd has announced the issuance of 8,008 ordinary fully paid securities, which will be quoted on the ASX. This move is part of an employee incentive scheme, indicating the company’s strategy to retain talent and enhance employee engagement. The issuance of these securities may impact Korvest’s market position by potentially increasing its share liquidity and aligning employee interests with those of shareholders.

More about Korvest Ltd.

Korvest Ltd operates in the industrial sector, focusing on the production and supply of infrastructure and industrial products. The company is known for its range of cable and pipe support systems, industrial access solutions, and galvanizing services, catering primarily to the construction and engineering markets.

YTD Price Performance: -6.88%

Average Trading Volume: 9,836

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$109.3M

data.title: China Pipe Group to Announce 2024 Financial Results and Dividend Decision
data.description:
The latest update is out from China Pipe Group Limited ( (HK:0380) ).

China Pipe Group Limited has announced that its board of directors will convene on March 26, 2025, to approve the company’s final results for the year ending December 31, 2024. The meeting will also consider the declaration of a final dividend. This announcement is significant as it may impact the company’s financial performance and shareholder returns, reflecting its operational outcomes for the past year.

More about China Pipe Group Limited

China Pipe Group Limited operates in the industrial sector, focusing on the manufacturing and distribution of pipe products. The company is incorporated in Bermuda and is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange under the stock code 00380.

data.title: Bunker Hill Mining Adjusts RSU Vesting Schedule
data.description:
The latest update is out from Bunker Hill Mining ( (TSE:BNKR) ).

Bunker Hill Mining Corp. has announced an amendment to the vesting schedule of certain restricted stock units (RSUs) granted to its directors and officers. The change will see 3,891,096 RSUs vest on May 1, 2025, rather than the previously scheduled dates in March 2025. This adjustment is part of the company’s ongoing efforts to align its incentive plans with its operational strategies, potentially impacting the company’s governance and stakeholder relations.

More about Bunker Hill Mining

Bunker Hill Mining Corp. is an American mineral exploration and development company focused on revitalizing a historic zinc, lead, and silver deposit in northern Idaho’s Coeur d’Alene mining district. The company aims to maximize shareholder value by leveraging modern exploration techniques and sustainable development practices to unlock the potential of this mineral-rich region.

data.title: Nippon Aqua Meets Prime Market Listing Criteria
data.description:
An update from Nippon Aqua Co., Ltd. ( (JP:1429) ) is now available.

Nippon Aqua Co., Ltd. has successfully met the Tokyo Stock Exchange’s Prime Market listing maintenance criteria as of December 31, 2024, by implementing various initiatives, including the disposal of treasury shares to improve its tradable share ratio. The company plans to continue enhancing its market performance and strengthening relationships with shareholders and investors to further solidify its position in the stock market.

More about Nippon Aqua Co., Ltd.

Nippon Aqua Co., Ltd. operates in the construction industry, focusing on providing insulation and waterproofing solutions. The company is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange’s Prime Market and is committed to maintaining its listing by adhering to the market’s criteria.

data.title: Metrics Income Opportunities Trust Announces NTA Update
data.description:
An update from Metrics Income Opportunities Trust Units ( (AU:MOT) ) is now available.

The Metrics Income Opportunities Trust has announced its unaudited Net Tangible Asset Backing per share as $2.1465 as of March 13, 2025. This update reflects the trust’s ongoing commitment to its investment objective of providing monthly cash income and potential upside gains, which may impact investor confidence and market positioning.

More about Metrics Income Opportunities Trust Units

Metrics Income Opportunities Trust is managed by The Trust Company (RE Services) Limited, part of the Perpetual group, which operates in funds management, financial advisory, and trustee services. The trust aims to provide monthly cash income, preserve investor capital, and manage investment risks through investments in private credit and other assets.
